title: Eungyo
tmdbOverview: A reclusive elderly poet feels the fire of his youth when gamine schoolgirl Eun-gyo enters his life, to the chagrin of the old man's assistant.
synopsis: Eungyo (2012) is a drama, romance and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 19 certification (KR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
